name: the Voidchill Amulet
description: A shard of black voidglass hung on a cord of frayed grave-linen, cold as the lightless expanse it was cut from. The Voidscar's wraiths drink light and warmth alike, and this splinter of their vault answers cold with cold — it hoards the deep freeze already in it so the wearer's own warmth is not the thing torn out of them when Vaelnith's dark comes devouring.
